name: 血猎手套（★） | 游击队
descriptionEn: These fingerless gloves have been decorated with metal studs and the Operation Bloodhound logo. It was made with a mix of brown leather and synthetic leather with a camo print. Valeria plans on retribution, of that there can be no doubt... - Sebastien Hennequet, Sniper
descriptionZh: 这副露指手套使用金属铆钉和“血猎大行动”的图标进行了装饰。 这副手套是用棕色皮革和人造皮革的混搭以及迷彩印刷制作的。 瓦莱里娅计划报复行动，这是毫无疑问的… - 狙击手塞巴斯蒂安.轩尼奎特
